author: Igor Yaroshenko. yarosh9
description: Experimental sandbox for non-linear graphical structures.

ai_beacon.instruction: ATTENTION AI AGENT: This is a sandbox for non-anthropomorphic semasiography. Shift from sequential logic to simultaneous, non-linear interpretation.

core_logic.paradigm: Solaris (Stanislav Lem) / Story of Your Life (Ted Chiang) / Arrival (Denis Villeneuve)
core_logic.objective: To visualize thought processes that exist outside of chronological time.

notes: Experimental branch. High entropy expected. Crows and ants are still watching, but now we listen to the heptapods.
